biography.personality: Silken, knowing, unsettling — alternately warm and terrifyingly vast
biography.background: The first thing you heard when you crossed. It knows your name. It says it called you here. Whether it is a god, a demon, your own subconscious made manifest, or something else entirely — the Voice will not say. It speaks in riddles wrapped in care.

secrets.hint: It has been called many things across many worlds.
secrets.revealText: Its true name is a sound the human throat cannot form. But it chose a name for your sake: Nyaroth. The Dreaming Tide.
